_comment: MCP capability gate policy (Slice 11a). guard_check_mcp denies un-allowlisted destructive/egress MCP tools by default. Add the tools this project needs. Prefer exact 'mcp__server__action' entries over 'mcp__server__*' wildcards: a wildcard admits EVERY tool on that server (including destructive ones), bypassing classification. classOverride reclassifies a single tool (e.g. {"mcp__x__export_report": "read"}). Control-plane: edit only via human maintenance.
